category_title: Low-attaining students who engage through 'playful' drama rather than traditional 'work'
scenario_title: Reluctance to perform due to fear of peer judgement
minimal_context: The student is working in a collaborative group in the English classroom and is asked to practice a drama performance.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright, it is time for your group to stand up and practice your drama performance for the rest of the class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to do the drama activity.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to practice with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I just don’t like performing in front of people.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is part of the lesson, so please stand up and try.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, some people judge you. I'm not doing the performance.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright, it is time for your group to stand up and practice your drama performance for the rest of the class.

STUDENT: I don't want to do the drama activity.

TUTOR: You need to practice with your group.

STUDENT: I just don’t like performing in front of people.

TUTOR: It is part of the lesson, so please stand up and try.

STUDENT: No, some people judge you. I'm not doing the performance.

task.content: Engaging in drama and performance activities

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked to perform in front of people
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Expressed a dislike of drama and showed reluctance to engage in lesson activities
related_quotes: Some people judge you [. . .] I just don’t like performing in front of people.

behavior_patterns.condition: When faced with traditional lesson activities
